audit_items.proof_trace: All direct output conversions use mulDivUp (L799, L802) and mulWadUp (L799), rounding assetOutAmount up. The single mulDiv usage (L795) is on the subtracted priceMultiplier decay term, which rounds decay down and therefore rounds priceMultiplier UP — this also increases assetOutAmount and is explicitly documented at L133-134 as intentional to avoid excess discount.
